prerequisites: A Rocketlane account with access to the API section under Settings, which is where API keys are generated.
An API key generated from the API section in Settings of your Rocketlane account. This is the only required configuration value for the connector (config field api_key).

authMethods.name: API key
authMethods.summary: Rocketlane authenticates every request with an API key sent in the api-key request header. The connector stores this value in its api_key secret field. You acquire the key from the API section in Settings of your Rocketlane account, and requests are made against the base URL https://api.rocketlane.com/api.

setupSteps.title: Generate a Rocketlane API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to your Rocketlane account and open Settings. Go to the API section and generate an API key. This key is the credential the API explorer and all endpoints expect under the Authentication section as the api-key header.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key to the connector
setupSteps.body: Set the connector's required api_key config field to the key you generated. The connector sends it on every request as the api-key header to authorize calls against https://api.rocketlane.com/api.

setupSteps.title: Verify the credential
setupSteps.body: Confirm the api-key value is not empty and is a valid key acquired from the Rocketlane API Settings tab. An empty or invalid api-key header causes authentication failures, so run a simple read request (for example, fetching a project) to confirm the key works before scheduling syncs.

sources.title: Quick Start - Rocketlane Developer Docs (generate API key from the API section in Settings; base URL https://api.rocketlane.com/api)
API Explorer - Rocketlane Developer Docs (provide api-key under the Authentication section)
Get project by Id - Rocketlane Developer Docs (valid api-key acquired from the Rocketlane API Settings tab)
